ab: Niqal su ali ka saya?
ch: M:你今天有空嘛?
en: Are you available today?

ab: Hmuwa wa?
ch: W:怎麼了?
en: What is the matter?

ab: Ni ku mkmeyah qmita isu.
ch: M:我想去拜訪你。
en: I would like to visit you.

ab: Muwa ka bobo na di? Uxe ku meeniq sapah ka ali saya.
ch: W:下回好嗎？我今天有事不在家。
en: How about next time? I am away from home today for something.

ab: Muwa ka kusun? Meeyah ku skadi isu bobo mnekan.
ch: M:那你明天好嗎?我下午去找你。
en: Then, are you available tomorrow? I’ll visit you tomorrow afternoon.

ab: Malu ma! Traun suma sapah hini.
ch: W:可以!我在家等你。
en: Sure, I will wait for you at home.

ab: Ye ini huwa spooda mu sreeru kari? Mkptasun mu wa.
ch: M:請問我們可以錄音嗎?我想做紀錄。
en: Would you mind if  I do the voice recording? I would like to keep a record.

ab: Malu ma! Ini huwa.
ch: W:好啊!可以的。
en: Sure! No problem.

ab: Hmuwa ka psaun ta saso pnssingan ega?
ch: M:我們可以錄影嗎?
en: Would you mind if I do the video recording?

ab: Iya wa! Naqah ku qtaan, ini snteri ka soko mu duri.
ch: W:不要啦!我不好看，倉庫也沒整理。
en: No, I am plain and the warehouse hasn’t been tidied up yet.

ab: Pssinge ta nanaq denu kini ho.
ch: M:那我拍照就好。
en: Then I will just take photos.

ab: Uxe ku psasing duri.
ch: W:我也不要拍照。
en: No photographing either.

ab: Mhuwe su bale smruwa yaku meyah qmita isu.
ch: M:謝謝你讓我訪問。
en: Thank you for accepting the interview.

ab: Ini huwa! Maanu ka ssiling su?
ch: W:沒問題，你想問什麼?
en: You are welcome. What would you like to know?

ab: Maanu ka qnpahan su sweewa hayan?
ch: M:請問您年輕時是做什麼的?
en: What do you do when you are young?

ab: Mnksacu ku ka cbeyo, malix ku saya da!
ch: W:我以前是警察，但我現在退休了！
en: I was a police officer but I am retired now.

ab: Ma niqal su qpahun ka saya di?
ch: M:那你現在有工作嗎?
en: Then, are you working at the moment?

ab: Ga ku qmeepah sapah pyasan.
ch: W:我在學校上班。
en: I am working at school.

ab: Ga meniq alang ka laqi su duri?
ch: M:請問您的孩子也住在部落嗎?
en: Do your kids live in the tribe too?

ab: Ini, ga meniq alang paru ka laqi mu.
ch: W:不，我的孩子在都市居住。
en: No, my kids are all living in the city.

ab: Marux su naq meniq hini?
ch: M:那你自己一個人住嗎?
en: Then, do you live by yourself?

ab: Ga ku tmabu kingal huling ma kingal qbheni, tnsapah mu ka dheya duri.
ch: W:我還有養一隻狗和一隻鳥，他們也是我的家人。
en: I also keep a dog and a bird. They are my family.

ab: Tmabu ku kingal ngiyo ka yaku, malu niqal tnbugan, tthiqun tikuh skdesun peni.
ch: M:我也有養一隻貓，為飼養物生活忙碌些。
en: I have a cat too. I won’t get bored with the company of my pet.

ab: Ni ku msiling isu pgyaun musa phuling wa!
ch: M:我想請問你關於打獵的禁忌！
en: I would like to ask you about the taboos of hunting.

ab: Ini keegu ka klaun mu duri. Ani si, sprengo mu da knklaan mu.
ch: W:我知道得也不多，但我能回答的都會回答你。
en: I don’t know much about that, but I will tell you everything I know.

ab: Niqal maanu ka pgyaun Qyqeya Phuling?
ch: M:你們打獵的武器有什麼禁忌嗎?
en: Do you have any taboos about hunting weapons?

ab: Ini ptlengi mmqedil ka Qyqeya Phuling.
ch: W:我們打獵的武器不可以讓女生碰到。
en: Our hunting weapons are untouchable to women.

ab: Ma, ye ini huwa musa phuling ka mmqedil duri ha?
ch: M:那女人可以一起去打獵嗎?
en: Then, can women go hunting together?

ab: Ini! Ini srwai phuling ka mmqedil duri.
ch: W:不行，女人也不可以打獵。
en: No, women cannot go hunting either.
